components.name: SiteNav
components.description: Frosted-glass pill navbar. 5 items: Wearable (dropdown→A1Sense,B1Eye), Neural (dropdown→A1Neuro), Programs, Updates, Search. Logo top-left. Burger on mobile.

components.name: HeroSection
components.description: Full-viewport hero. Announcement bar top. Brand wordmark. H1 headline. Three category pills (A1Sense, B1Eye, A1Neuro). Scroll indicator. Full-bleed background image.

components.name: BreakthroughIntro
components.description: Two-col section on grey-light bg. Left: 2-line label (Overview/Breakthrough). Right: copy paragraph with rotating text line + arrow link.

components.name: CompanyDetails
components.description: Dark bg section (off-black). Top: 2-line title + 3 numbered mission items (0.1 Mission, 0.2 Vision, 0.3 Ambition) each with hairline rule. Bottom: 3 data cells (Industries, Core Business, Domain) + 0.4 abbreviations row.

components.name: InvisibleApproach
components.description: Off-white bg. Section label 'Meet Our'. Large display headline (blue, clamp ~9.7vw). Floating product image (parallax, switches between products). Body copy left col. Explore pills right col.

components.name: AboutSection
components.description: Dark bg (off-black). Two stacked sub-items: (A) Our Progress — subtitle 'The new Method' + rich text + arrow link to Updates. (B) Our Aim — subtitle 'A Radical Impact' + rich text + arrow link to Programs.

components.name: ScientificEvidence
components.description: Full-width blue bg section. Number '1.0'. Title. Short copy. Down-arrow CTA link. Centered layout.

components.name: TextBlockGrid
components.description: Off-white bg. Two-col grid on desktop. Item 2.0 Driven by People + Item 3.0 Get in Touch. Each: number + title + body copy + arrow link.

components.name: SiteFooter
components.description: Off-black bg. Wordmark top-left. Two link groups: 1.0 Pages (all routes) + 2.0 Follow (LinkedIn, X). Brand icon. Legal links row (Privacy, Terms, Cookie). Location label 'Italy'.
